title: glandularia latilobata
intro: Glandularia latilobata, also known as the butterfly plant or verbena, is a flowering plant native to the Andean region of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Glandularia latilobata include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Glandularia latilobata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
